statement: Kanban Builder Island as creation surface — The Kanban Builder Island is a strategic creation surface. It starts compact and expands into a creation/control strip, with a reserved AI entry point, giving users a guided drag-to-create experience. — Compact button expands inline into a creation/control strip. Far-right reserves an AI Chat entry point. Supports drag-to-create: phase created only on drop into a valid board location, action only on drop into a phase, task only on drop into an action. Valid parent/drop target is highlighted during drag; created item animates/highlights after drop.
affected_modules: src/pages/builder/islands/ (Kanban Builder Island); src/pages/builder/kanban/; dropzone engine
